features.name: mux with partial bit range select output
features.description: Code should include a $mux cell where the output Y connects to a partial bit range of a wider wire (e.g., wire[68:2]) rather than the full wire
features.snippet:
cell $mux \288
    parameter \WIDTH 67
    connect \A 67'x
    connect \B \internal_bus [68:2]
    connect \S 1'x
    connect \Y $auto$ghdl.cc:806:import_module$61

features.name: wire with multiple bit range connect aliases
features.description: Code should include a wire that receives multiple connect statements assigning different bit ranges from different sources, creating multiple driver scenario

features.name: indirect wire driven by cell output
features.description: Code should include an indirect wire ($indirect$) that is driven by a cell output, where the wire is later used in conflicting connect statements
